Speaker: Woman
Text: You're outta your mind! Don't bring anything over here, because I don't even know what the hell you're talkin' about!

Speaker: Woman
Text: What is a dog bowel? A butt bowel. What is that?

Speaker: Woman
Text: Listen, don't fuckin' call over here, gettin' rude with my mother! Are you fuckin' crazy?

Speaker: Woman
Text: What the fuck are you talking about? You are a sick bastard. You know that?

Speaker: Woman
Text: Hey, don't mess with me, fucker! Do you... I mean, are you stupid, or what?

Speaker: Woman
Text: Hey, hey... you know what? You come over here with your fish, you stupid bastard! Why don't you come over here right now? I'd love to see this!

Speaker: Woman
Text: to see this. Right now. You know what, bastard? You're gonna pay. He's such a fucking jackass.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Well, just... come on over, okay? Come on over, you stupid ignorant... fucker.

Speaker: Woman
Text: You know what, you son of a bitch? You can try and come over and hit me in the lips! [laughs] You're a jackass!
